description: Synthetic federation pack examples for governed cross-instance query boundaries.

packs.description: Personal personal state can read SampleCo interpreted state through a governed instance route.

identity_boundary.subject_ref_policy: Use remote state refs as evidence refs; do not rewrite them into personal canonical records.
identity_boundary.entity_ref_policy: SampleCo entities remain owned by state_instance.sampleco.
identity_boundary.cross_instance_join_policy: Join only through explicit evidence refs and package route context.

materialization_policy.raw_remote_corpus_policy: Raw SampleCo source corpora remain in the SampleCo instance.
materialization_policy.materialized_summary_policy: Summaries must cite package/read-model evidence refs.

subject_note_policy.policy: This pack does not write or materialize subject notes.

output_policy.answer_boundary: Use SampleCo state as interpreted work evidence, not as personal source data.

repair_policy.when_unavailable: Answer from personal sources and state that SampleCo federation is unavailable.
repair_policy.when_stale: Name the stale SampleCo package watermark before relying on it.

packs.description: SampleCo can query the example personal Relationship Substrate for governed relationship context without local materialization.

identity_boundary.subject_ref_policy: People and organizations remain source-owned by Relationship Substrate.
identity_boundary.entity_ref_policy: SampleCo may cite relationship evidence refs but must not create local canonical person files.
identity_boundary.cross_instance_join_policy: Join only for the active SampleCo relationship or business-development question.

materialization_policy.raw_remote_corpus_policy: No raw personal relationship records may be copied into SampleCo state.
materialization_policy.materialized_summary_policy: SampleCo answers may summarize relationship context with evidence refs only.

subject_note_policy.policy: Subject notes demote or explain context for the specific question; they are not hidden broad filters.

output_policy.answer_boundary: Use relationship evidence only when it materially helps an SampleCo relationship, partnership, or follow-up question.

repair_policy.when_unavailable: Answer from SampleCo company sources and name the missing relationship federation route.
repair_policy.when_stale: State the Relationship Substrate freshness gap and avoid treating old relationship context as current.

packs.description: Portfolio-level state can plan rollups across PortfolioCo and ResearchCo once their packages have proved readiness.

identity_boundary.subject_ref_policy: Company subjects remain owned by their deployed instance roots.
identity_boundary.entity_ref_policy: Portfolio rollups cite remote instance refs instead of copying company records.
identity_boundary.cross_instance_join_policy: Join only on declared portfolio rollup refs and package summaries.

materialization_policy.raw_remote_corpus_policy: No PortfolioCo or ResearchCo raw corpora are present in open-source examples.
materialization_policy.materialized_summary_policy: Planned rollups must remain gap-marked until remote packages prove readiness.

subject_note_policy.policy: Portfolio rollup does not read or write relationship subject notes.

output_policy.answer_boundary: Treat this as planned federation until remote instance packages render with readiness evidence.

repair_policy.when_unavailable: Report that portfolio federation is planned and list missing instance readiness proofs.
repair_policy.when_stale: Regenerate remote package/readiness before producing portfolio rollup answers.
